words.def: (mathematics) a rectangular array of quantities or expressions set out by rows and columns; treated as a single element and manipulated according to rules
words.zh: n. 母體, 子宮, 基質, 脈石, 模型, 矩陣

words.def: the products of human creativity; works of art collectively
words.zh: n. 藝術, 人文科學, 技術, 巧妙, 詭計, 美術

words.def: a mixture of gases (especially oxygen) required for breathing; the stuff that the wind consists of
words.zh: n. 空氣, 旋律, 態度

words.def: a human limb; technically the part of the superior limb between the shoulder and the elbow but commonly used to refer to the whole superior limb
words.zh: n. 手臂, 袖子, 狹長港灣, 武器

words.def: a commercially prepared mixture of dry ingredients
words.zh: n. 混合物, 混亂, 糊塗

words.def: charge against a citizen's person or property or activity for the support of government
words.zh: n. 稅, 稅款, 重負, 會費
